nasb.text: Then he called for Johanan the son of Kareah and all the commanders of the forces that were with him, and for all the people both small and great,

esv.text: Then he summoned Johanan the son of Kareah and all the commanders of the forces who were with him, and all the people from the least to the greatest,

cnv.text: 耶利米就把加利亞的兒子約哈難，和所有與他一起的將領，以及全體人民，從最小的到最大的，都叫了來，

ccb.text: 耶利米便召集加利亚的儿子约哈难和众将领及各阶层的民众，
